candidate.title: Local NCCL technical blog network, observability, reliability, and cost evidence

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Confirmed local captures exist under raw/crawler/nccl-technical-blog for NCCL Inspector Prometheus, NCCL communication observability, AI fabric resiliency, NCCL 2.24 reliability/observability, NCCL 2.22 cost estimation, RoCE, Spectrum-X, NVBandwidth, and SHARP. raw/crawler/nccl-nvidia-blog-wide contains overlapping duplicate captures for the Inspector and NVBandwidth pages, so this task selects the nccl-technical-blog copies as canonical local evidence.
local_checks.wiki_search: Searched current ai_infra wiki pages for NCCL Inspector, Prometheus, Spectrum-X, RoCE, SHARP, NVBandwidth, RAS, and cost estimation. Existing curated NCCL pages cover release notes and GitHub issues but do not contain a dedicated technical-blog reference for network observability, reliability, convergence, or cost-estimation evidence.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: Read wiki/index.md, wiki/projects/nccl.md, wiki/references/nccl-release-notes.md, wiki/references/nccl-github-closed-issues.md, coverage-map.json, loop-state.json, and ingest.md. The domain index has no existing NCCL technical blog network observability reference.

gap_reason: coverage-map.json marked eval-observability-reliability and network-storage-cluster partial and security-governance-cost weak, while candidate backlog requested observability, profiling/debug, cost, cluster fabric, Spectrum-X/RoCE/EFA, and storage/fabric evidence. The selected local NCCL technical blog captures directly cover NCCL Inspector/Prometheus observability, RAS/NIC Fusion reliability, Spectrum-X/RoCE convergence, SHARP/NVBandwidth performance diagnostics, and NCCL 2.22 cost-estimation evidence without new external fetching.

duplicate_findings.finding: Duplicate capture of the NCCL Inspector Prometheus article; canonical local evidence for this task uses the nccl-technical-blog copy with matching content hash suffix.
Duplicate capture of the NVBandwidth article; canonical local evidence for this task uses the nccl-technical-blog copy with matching content hash suffix.
